items.question: Which statement activates a context manager?
items.explanation: The with statement enters and exits a context manager around a block.

items.question: Which pair of methods defines the context-manager protocol?
items.explanation: __enter__ runs on entry, __exit__ on exit (including on exceptions).

items.question: In an @contextmanager generator, the cleanup code should go…
options: in a finally block after the yield
it is automatic and not needed
items.answer: in a finally block after the yield
items.explanation: finally ensures cleanup runs even if the with-block raises.

items.question: Returning True from __exit__ will…
options: suppress any exception from the block
items.answer: suppress any exception from the block
items.explanation: A truthy __exit__ return value swallows the exception; usually you return falsy.
